archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) merged with Light Luxury

branding.name: Hasanamba Car Decor
branding.description: Premium luxury car stereo and styling shop based in Hassan, Karnataka.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter text-[#0A0A0A]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. 2-3x more padding than standard websites to convey luxury and breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8
spacing_and_layout.cards: bg-[#F8F9FA] p-8 md:p-12 border border-[#E5E7EB] hover:border-[#0047FF]/30 transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#0047FF] hover:bg-[#0038CC] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,71,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-300

components.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

motion.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling is HIGHLY RECOMMENDED for a premium feel.
motion.entrance: Framer motion staggered fade-ups for grid items (initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }).
motion.hover: Subtle scale-up on images (hover:scale-105) with overflow-hidden on parent.

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Minimalist premium introduction. High contrast typography against a clean background, overlapping with the sleek luxury car visual.
sections.layout: Grid or flex layout where text takes up 50% and the car visual takes up 50%, or a large central typography overlapping a wide cinematic shot.

sections.name: Services Grid
sections.description: Bento grid layout showcasing Premium Audio Systems, Custom Car Interiors, Professional Detailing, and Advanced Lighting.
sections.layout: Asymmetrical Tetris grid. E.g., Audio takes up span-8, Detailing takes up span-4.

sections.name: Portfolio Gallery
sections.description: High-end visual showcase of their work.
sections.layout: Masonry grid or a sleek horizontal scrolling carousel (Framer Motion) of high-res images without gaps, separated only by thin 1px borders.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: Social proof justifying the premium price.
sections.layout: Minimalist typography-focused cards. Big quote marks, serif or italicized text for the quote to contrast with the modern sans-serif.

sections.name: About Us
sections.layout: Text-heavy block with ample negative space. Off-center alignment.

sections.name: Contact
sections.description: Location and phone number display only. No forms.
sections.layout: Massive typography for the phone number (+91 97419 08073) and clear typography for location (Thanniruhalla, Hassan).

images.description: Sleek luxury car silhouette with electric blue neon lighting accents on a white background
Black and brown BMW luxury car interior
Bose speaker grill on a car door panel
Detailed shot of a Lamborghini being polished
Mercedes-Benz interior design with premium leather
Vintage luxury car interior with wooden dashboard

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. DO NOT default to generic dark mode. This is a LIGHT, HIGH-CONTRAST premium theme.
Use Outfit for Headings and Manrope for body text. Enforce tracking-tighter on headings.
Implement a generous bento grid for the services section using the provided tertiary background color for cards.
Ensure all interactive components (buttons, links) have the required `data-testid` attributes.
DO NOT use placeholder image URLs. Rely entirely on the provided media URLs.
The Contact section must only display the provided phone number and location text. Do not render a contact form.
Use Phosphor icons (if needed) for a premium, lightweight look.
